summary: Independently verified task-003 bundle-and-verify. Bundle mtime 1775910630 (regenerated ~200s ago). Bundled grep for --data/--file returns exactly 3 whitelisted declarations: event log --data (L13161), context write --data (L13681), packet create --content/--file (L14594). Repo-wide grep across src/cli, plugin/skills, plugin/agents: 23 --data hits, all 'geas event log --data' (whitelisted); 0 --file hits. Re-ran npm test: 31/31 pass, 6 suites, 406ms. Smoke pipe (echo JSON | geas mission write-spec): exit non-zero with 'required option --id not specified' — did not hang, stdin path exercised cleanly. All 7 ACs independently confirmed.

criteria_results.criterion: AC2: npm run bundle succeeds, plugin/bin/geas updated (mtime recent)
AC3: bundled grep residuals are whitelist-only (event log, context write, packet create)
AC4: repo-wide grep shows 0 non-whitelisted --data/--file usages
AC6: pipe/heredoc/redirection smoke forms exercise stdin without hangs
AC7: TTY hang simulation exits non-zero without timeout signal
